name: Roasted Vegetable Hash with Poached Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 cups of water and 1 tablespoon white wine vinegar to a simmer in a large sauté pan.
2. For the hash: Heat olive oil in a very large sauté pan until very hot. Add potatoes and sweet potato and cook until well browned, about 4 to 5 minutes.
3. Add onion and garlic and sauté until you can smell the aroma. Add zucchini and yellow squash and sauté until crisp-tender, about 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and toss with the vegetables. Season the mixture with Worcestershire sauce, cayenne sauce, basil, salt, and pepper. Toss well and keep warm while poaching eggs.
5. To poach the eggs: Gently add the eggs into the simmering water using a cup to prevent breaking them. Poach for 4 to 5 minutes, or until yolks are nearly cooked.
6. Divide the hash among 6 plates, then top each serving with 2 poached eggs.
7. Serve warm, with hot sauce on the side.
